generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor measuring temperature in building"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor measuring humidity levels"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring ambient light levels"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor detecting room occupancy"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance RuntimeData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Integrated runtime data from building sensors and BCS components"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted, HumidityDataTransmitted, LightLevelDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto, ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Model enriched with device metadata and runtime data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMModelingTools, ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT-based IoT communication protocol for sensor data ingestion and device management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital Twin management framework for device connectivity and state synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization and simulation engine for digital twin rendering"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService, SimulationService
]

instance BIMModelingTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Tools for creating and managing Building Information Modeling (BIM) assets"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService, SimulationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering framework for automated BIM-to-runtime artifact transformation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring of building environmental parameters and system status"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeTemperatureInsight, RealTimeHumidityInsight, RealTimeLightLevelInsight, RealTimeOccupancyInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates building operations under various scenarios for performance analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analyzes historical and real-time data to predict future trends and anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, HealthEffectsInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimizes energy consumption through adaptive control strategies"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationAction
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adjusts lighting and environmental factors for optimal visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAdjustmentAction
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides 3D visualization of the building model and real-time data using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThreeDVisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeTemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data for monitoring building conditions"
]

instance RealTimeHumidityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity data for monitoring building conditions"
]

instance RealTimeLightLevelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time light level data for monitoring building conditions"
]

instance RealTimeOccupancyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data for monitoring building conditions"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for optimizing energy consumption in building operations"
]

instance HealthEffectsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights related to occupant health impacts from environmental conditions"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from building simulation scenarios for operational planning"
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual insights from 3D model rendering for facility management"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of HVAC settings for energy efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts lighting levels based on occupancy and natural light"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system control actuator receiving commands from digital twin"
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting system control actuator receiving commands from digital twin"
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, LightLevelSensor, OccupancySensor, HVACActuator, LightingActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals (e.g., HVAC setpoints, lighting commands) sent via Eclipse Hono and Ditto to physical actuators in Building Control Systems (BCS)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Sub-second to second-level synchronization for sensor data and control signals; simulation and optimization processes operating at varying time scales (e.g., minutes for energy optimization, real-time for monitoring)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated modular services including BIM-based models, Eclipse Hono/Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine visualization, and standardized extension points for service integration."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Entire building life cycle including design, construction, operation, and refurbishment phases, with the DT primarily focused on operational phase monitoring and optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validated using Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to ensure interoperability and architectural soundness; real-time synchronization minimizes semantic drift."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono (MQTT-based IoT messaging) and Ditto (digital twin protocol) for bidirectional communication."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Cloud-based or containerized deployment using Eclipse Hono and Ditto; specific infrastructure details not provided."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems via standardized interfaces (e.g., BIM, IoT protocols), though specific systems not detailed."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM standards (IFC), Eclipse Hono/Ditto protocols, and ODTE metric for interoperability; adherence to AECO-specific standards."
]
